relationships.context: N5OS tag system is described as Howie's system
Smart prep actions are based on N5OS tags
Priority markers (!! and [LD-INV]) are part of the tag system
Prep actions adapt based on accommodation levels
Stakeholder-specific BLUFs vary by stakeholder type (investors, hiring, partners)
Both domains used to identify internal-only meetings to exclude
